title: Tangy Light Festive Norwegian Goose Fat Pancakes
description: These tangy and light goose fat pancakes are perfect for a festive breakfast or snack, featuring savory flavors that won't overshadow the goose fat's distinct taste.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour and salt.
Add the vegetable oil to the dry ingredients and mix well until no lumps remain.
Pour in the goose fat and soy sauce. Mix gently to avoid breaking down the batter too much.
Add turmeric powder and apple cider vinegar. Stir quickly but thoroughly.
Divide the mixture into smaller portions and shape them into flat pancakes using your hands or a ladle.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add a few drops of oil to prevent sticking.
Place each pancake on the skillet and cook for about 2-3 minutes until golden brown on both sides. Cook in batches if necessary.
Serve hot with a side of fresh fruit or a dollop of yogurt.
